scripts.build: npm run build -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run build -w backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start:backend: npm run start:migrate && npm run start -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run typecheck -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run build -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run test -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run coverage -w @repo/impact-contract && npm run coverage -w backend && npm run coverage -w frontend
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
